Welcome to DevForge! I'm Mike, the tech lead. Code review is critical work — catching bugs before they reach production saves everyone time and protects our users.

Take your time reviewing each PR carefully. The review standards doc is solid, and we're here if you need context about specific parts of the codebase.

Looking forward to working with you.

Mike Torres

DevForge Technologies, Seattle WA
